prompt: I have an existing Excel file at C:\TestCases\QA_Suite.xlsx and I want to add test cases for the Cart Page (https://example-shop.com/cart) WITHOUT creating a new file. Add a sheet called 'Cart Page'. I want positive, negative and edge cases. Valid login credentials: admin@shop.com / Admin123. Place the valid login TC last. Created By: Priya Nair. Include BVA for quantity field (min=1) and cover XSS in the quantity input.
assertions: The script loads an EXISTING file rather than creating a new one from scratch
shutil.copy2 or equivalent is used to work on a temp copy before saving
The sheet is named exactly 'Cart Page'
At least 20 test cases are generated for the Cart module
The valid login TC (admin@shop.com) is the LAST test case
A BVA test case for quantity = 1 (minimum boundary) is included
An XSS test case for the quantity input field is included
A negative TC for guest user accessing /cart without login is included
The PermissionError fallback (save to temp file) is implemented
Created By is set to 'Priya Nair'
The script does NOT create a completely new Excel file — it adds to the existing one
